jsonLd.title: MedPlus is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
